message.content:
@startuml
actor Actor
participant "ConditionalFormattingCellExtensionAction" as CFCExtAct
participant "ConditionalFormattingCellWindow" as CFCCW
participant Cell
participant ReationalOperator
participant Language
participant UIController
participant ConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension as CFCSBE

Actor -> CFCExtAct : starts use case
CFCExtAct->CFCCW:create()
activate CFCCW
note right of CFCCW #D3D3D3\n#008B45 \nend note 
deactivate CFCCW 

CFCCW->Language:list=getBinaryOperators()\ngetIdentifier()
language-->cfccw:return list,getidentifier


group select operator
    cfccw-->>actor:asks to choose a opertor
    
   loop until one selected
   
       actor -->cfccw:select one
      
       
  end
  
  
  

    
   
    
    
    

    



@enduml
